## Description

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link related issues, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

<!-- Match the Conventional Commit type(s) used in your commits. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `chore` / `build` / `ci`
- [ ] `test`

## How has this been tested?

<!--
  Describe what you ran and the result. Note anything you could NOT test and why.
  Examples:
    - PowerShell parses cleanly (Parser::ParseFile)
    - Booted a WinPE VM to the UI
    - Interactive deploy to a scratch disk
    - Zero-touch against a test machines/<serial>.json
    - OPA allow AND deny cases exercised
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`) and I am listed in `CONTRIBUTORS.md` (DCO).
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] I updated documentation (README / Server / policy) where relevant.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, `*.wim`, or `dev-server/` contents are committed.
- [ ] This PR contains no classified information, CUI, or PII.
